state_analysis: The attempt to run the MTEB evaluation failed due to an ImportError related to 'AutoModelForVision2Seq' from the 'transformers' library. This suggests that the installed version of 'transformers' might not support this specific import, causing the evaluation script to fail.
explanation: We will upgrade the 'transformers' library to the latest version to resolve the ImportError. After upgrading, we will retry the MTEB evaluation command with the 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2' model.
